calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Sanguinetti in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has no authorization to rule on the petition, that Ms. Chiappe did not live here and that she died in another country. The Court also advised Mr. Sanguinetti to have a Lawyer in Uruguay establish fact of death there. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death was denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Ruiz.
